introduction: I’m building two companies that address different sides of the same massive market opportunity: cannabis operations and cannabis retail technology. Perception Farms is a vertically integrated cannabis cultivation and retail business operating across Illinois and Minnesota — we’ve been running a dispensary in Chicago since 2024, and we’re now building a cultivation facility and second retail location in Minnesota with leases signed and construction underway. JoYnt is a cannabis industry SaaS platform delivering fully integrated dispensary e-commerce, kiosk, and POS solutions — the first product on the market built on the Treez headless e-commerce API, positioned for growth as new states come online. These ventures are complementary by design: one builds the physical infrastructure of cannabis retail, the other builds the digital infrastructure. Behind both is 15+ years of shipping technology products across FinTech, AdTech, and MarTech, plus an M.S. in Quantitative Finance from the Illinois Institute of Technology. That analytical rigor and technical depth drives JoYnt’s product development and the operational systems behind Perception Farms. If you’re an investor, advisor, or potential partner interested in either venture, I’d welcome the conversation.
experience-intro:
Throughout my career, I have led and contributed to a diverse range of technical and business ventures, spanning fintech, adtech, SAAS, and the legal cannabis industry. My expertise in software engineering, product strategy, and business leadership has allowed me to build and scale innovative solutions, from high-frequency trading systems to AI-driven workforce platforms and integrated ecommerce solutions for regulated markets. 
I have worked with companies of all sizes, from global enterprises to startups, taking on roles that blend technical architecture, strategic leadership, and hands-on development. My experience includes managing high-performing teams, optimizing mission-critical software, and launching successful products that drive business growth.
This page highlights the companies I have worked with over the years, showcasing the impact I've made across industries through innovation, automation, and strategic execution.
portfolio-intro:
Over the years, I have worked on a diverse range of projects that span software engineering, financial modeling, high-frequency trading, decentralized finance, and the legal cannabis industry. My portfolio reflects a combination of technical innovation, strategic leadership, and problem-solving across multiple disciplines, from developing scalable SAAS platforms to optimizing real-time trading systems.
These projects showcase my ability to bridge technology and business, whether through architecting high-performance trading platforms, creating AI-driven workforce solutions, or pioneering ecommerce and digital signage systems for regulated industries. Each project represents a unique challenge that I’ve tackled with a combination of technical expertise, analytical thinking, and a deep understanding of market dynamics.
This page serves as a curated collection of the projects I’ve built, led, or contributed to—each demonstrating my commitment to innovation, efficiency, and delivering impactful solutions.
contact-intro:
If you’re interested in working together, have a question, or just want to connect, feel free to reach out. Whether it’s discussing potential opportunities, consulting on a project, or exploring collaborations, I’m always open to meaningful conversations.
With a background spanning software engineering, fintech, SAAS, and the legal cannabis industry, I bring a unique blend of technical expertise and strategic insight. If my experience aligns with your needs, let’s start a conversation.
You can contact me via email or connect with me on professional networks. Looking forward to hearing from you!
